vim_plugin_integration.overview: Guide for integrating genero-tools into Vim plugins

hover_information.use_case: Show function signature and metadata on hover
hover_information.data_needed: name, signature, parameters, returns, file, line

find_references.use_case: Find all places where function is called

type_resolution.use_case: Resolve function types, show resolved LIKE references, disambiguate same-named functions
type_resolution.data_needed: file_path, actual_type, is_like_reference, resolved, resolved_columns, resolved_types

type_debugging.use_case: Debug type resolution issues and validate data consistency

hover_with_resolved_types.use_case: Show resolved LIKE types in hover information (v2.1.0+)
hover_with_resolved_types.example: LIKE account.* resolves to [id, name, balance] with types [INTEGER, VARCHAR(100), DECIMAL(10,2)]

database_based.example: sqlite3 workspace.db 'SELECT * FROM functions WHERE name = ?'

setup_steps: 1. Generate all metadata (automatic schema detection): bash generate_all.sh /path/to/codebase
3. Verify databases exist: ls -la workspace.db modules.db
4. Test basic query: query.sh find-function test_function
5. Test type resolution: query.sh find-function-resolved test_function (if schema available)

setup_steps_detailed.automatic_setup: bash generate_all.sh /path/to/codebase - Generates signatures, modules, parses schema (if present), and resolves types
manual_setup: bash query.sh create-dbs - Create indexed SQLite databases
setup_steps_detailed.schema_detection: Schema files (.sch) are automatically detected and processed. Type resolution is skipped gracefully if no schema is found.

caching_strategy.cache_level_1: In-memory cache of recent queries (1000 entries)
caching_strategy.cache_level_2: File-based cache of function metadata (updated hourly)
caching_strategy.invalidation: Regenerate databases when source files change

performance_tips: Use pattern search for autocomplete (faster than full scan)
Use database interface for complex queries
Implement incremental updates for large codebases
Cache resolved type information for frequently accessed functions

new_in_v2_1.resolved_types_in_database: Resolved LIKE types are now stored directly in workspace.db for efficient querying
new_in_v2_1.find_function_resolved: New query command to get functions with resolved type information
new_in_v2_1.type_debugging: unresolved-types and validate-types commands for debugging type resolution
new_in_v2_1.automatic_schema_detection: Schema files are automatically found and processed during generate_all.sh
new_in_v2_1.example_resolved_type_query: query.sh find-function-resolved process_contract returns resolved LIKE types with actual columns and types

error_handling.query_timeout: Set 5s timeout, show cached results if available
